hero.heading: Build & Deploy Instantly
hero.lede: Automated web services for Myanmar developers. Get your own .myanmardev.com subdomain, build websites, and deploy in seconds. No credit card required.
hero.footnote: powered by Cloudflare API · instant DNS propagation

how.heading: Simple 3-Step Process
how.step1desc: Browse our catalog of automated web services. Each product has a clear token cost. No hidden fees.
how.step2desc: Sign in with Google or GitHub. Use your token balance to purchase products instantly.
how.step3desc: Our automation creates your resource instantly. No waiting. No approval queues. Live in seconds.

product.heading: What We Offer
product.lede: Automated web services designed for Myanmar developers. No credit card required. Deploy instantly.

coming.heading: More products coming. All automated.
coming.p1desc: Build professional websites from templates. No coding required. Just pick a template, add your content, and deploy.
coming.p2desc: Showcase your projects with a polished portfolio. Auto-fetches your GitHub repos and contributions.
coming.p3desc: Full business site with contact forms, service pages, and SEO optimization. Deploy with your custom subdomain.
coming.p4desc: Digital menu with QR code generation. Customers scan and browse your menu instantly. No app download.
coming.p5desc: Full e-commerce ordering with payment integration. Inventory management and automated order fulfillment.
coming.p6desc: Cloud POS with receipt printing, sales tracking, and inventory sync. Web-based, works on any device.
coming.p7desc: Online course platform with video hosting, quizzes, certificates. Build your own learning platform.

pricing.heading: How Tokens Work
pricing.lede: Tokens are our universal currency. Buy once, use across all products. No subscriptions, no hidden fees.
pricing.redeemLede: Sign in and redeem your code for free tokens. No credit card required.
